assertions.title: Product card click navigates to detail page

steps.action: Navigate to Goods home page after login
steps.observed: Product grid displayed with 6 product cards showing images, names, and prices

steps.action: Click on 'Kylian Mbappé #10 France Jersey' product card
steps.expected: Navigate to product detail page with matching product name and image
steps.observed: Navigated to /products/cmn5r7wn20005l0miiglpgntz with matching title 'Kylian Mbappé #10 France Jersey' and product image

assertions.title: Product detail page displays all fields

steps.observed: Product image 'Kylian Mbappé #10 France Jersey' displayed prominently at top
Title 'Kylian Mbappé #10 France Jersey' displayed as h2 heading
Description section with text 'France World Cup champion jersey with Mbappé #10. Official replica with embroidered badge.'
'For sale' button visible in bottom action bar
'Purchase' button visible in bottom action bar (blue)

evidence.network: Page loaded with all product data

steps.action: Click 'Purchase' button on product detail page
steps.observed: Modal appeared with title 'Success' and message 'Purchase request submitted successfully' with OK button

steps.expected: Dialog dismissed, user remains on detail page
steps.observed: Dialog dismissed, URL remains /products/cmn5r7wn20005l0miiglpgntz, product detail page still visible

evidence.network: No navigation occurred after dialog dismissal

assertions.title: For Sale button shows confirmation dialog

steps.action: Click 'For sale' button on product detail page
steps.observed: Modal appeared with title 'Success' and message 'Listing request submitted successfully' with OK button

steps.expected: Dialog dismissed, user remains on detail page
steps.observed: Dialog dismissed, URL remains /products/cmn5r7wn20005l0miiglpgntz, product detail page still visible

evidence.network: No navigation occurred after dialog dismissal

steps.action: Click 'Go back' button on product detail page
steps.expected: Navigate back to Goods listing page with product grid visible
steps.observed: Navigated back to http://localhost:3100/ (Goods home page) with banner carousel, search bar, and product grid all visible

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All product detail page flows work correctly — card navigation, field display, Purchase dialog, For Sale dialog, and back navigation.
